allowed_claims: the project aligns with phase-field inverse PINN literature at the parameter-inversion paradigm level
the phase-field smoke benchmark is supplementary sanity evidence
benchmark: synthetic numerical digital-twin phase-field inverse alignment smoke
forbidden_claims: phase-field smoke is a main-text core experiment
manuscript_sentence_for_related_work_ali: A small synthetic Allen-Cahn mobility inversion with full-field anchors supports related-work alignment with phase-field inverse PINN literature, while the main paper claim remains sparse-port gamma_sub target reduction.
note: Synthetic numerical digital-twin phase-field inverse alignment smoke; not sparse-port current inversion and not experimental data.
